properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v1 v2 v3 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Praise him in the sanctuary Praise him with the timbrel and dance Praise him with the sound of a trumpet Praise him for His mighty acts Praise him for His mighty acts

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Praise him in the mighty heavens Praise him for His greatness to us Praise him with the clash of the cymbals He alone is worthy Praise the Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let everything that hath breath Praise him Let everything that hath breath Praise the Lord Let everything that hath breath Praise him, Praise the Lord, Praise the Lord, Praise the Lord

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Let everything that hath breath Praise him Let everything that hath breath Praise the Lord Let everything that hath breath Praise him, Praise the Lord Praise the Lord, Praise the Lord Praise the Lord
